scripts.dev: npm run -w @writing-ide/kb-core build && npm run -w @writing-ide/tools build && npm run -w @writing-ide/agent-core build && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run -w @writing-ide/kb-core build && npm run -w @writing-ide/tools build && npm run -w @writing-ide/agent-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
